summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Rate Limiting Strategy Analyzer iteration 2. All major functionality is working correctly. Backend APIs fully functional (10/10 tests pass). Frontend Run All experiment successfully displays comparison table with all 3 strategies, performance charts, and dynamic analysis. Individual experiments work perfectly with real-time metrics and WebSocket updates.

ui_bugs.issue: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1, but charts render correctly
ui_bugs.error_details: The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0 - cosmetic console warning only

passed_tests: Backend API /api/experiment/run-all returns all 3 strategies with results and analysis
Frontend Run All button successfully completes and displays comparison table with 3 strategies
Comparison table shows all metrics (accepted, rejected, latency, throughput, stability)
Analysis section displays dynamic text based on experiment results
Performance comparison chart renders with all 3 strategies
Strategy dropdown allows changing rate limiting mode
All backend API endpoints (10/10 tests pass)
Rate limiting behavior works correctly (returns 200 and 429 codes)
Charts render and update with time series data

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all major functionality works, minor chart console warnings)

action_item_for_main_agent: Optional: Fix Recharts console warnings about chart dimensions. This is a minor cosmetic issue that doesn't affect functionality - charts render and update correctly.
